results.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tie the knot at star-studded New York wedding
results.description: The event at Madison Square Garden brought out Hollywood's A-list

results.title: No bridesmaids, no groomsmen: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce break wedding tradition
results.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce chose to break away from wedding tradition by opting against bridesmaids and groomsmen during their wedding ceremony at New York’s Madison Square Garden, instead assigning key roles to their siblings on their special day. According to PEOPLE magazine, the duo tied the knot on Friday, July 3, in a private [...]
